project_type: React SPA with TypeScript, Vite, Zustand state management
verification_instructions: Run npx tsc -b && npx vite build to ensure no type errors and bundle builds correctly
environment_constraints: No test framework, validation via TypeScript compilation and Vite build only
key_patterns: Components use Zustand store via useGameStore hook. i18n uses useT() hook returning a t() function. CSS is minified in App.css with one-line rules. Modals follow kami-modal pattern: fixed backdrop + centered content. Game data comes from gameState.seasonCardsDeck filtered by currentSeason.
directory_structure: src/components/ - React components; src/types/ - TypeScript types; src/store/ - Zustand store; src/i18n/ - translations (en.ts, es.ts, index.ts); src/App.css - all styles (minified)
